title: stelis johnsonii
intro: Stelis johnsonii, also known as the Johnson's stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis johnsonii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
